category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Uganda UNBS PVoC, Certificate of Conformity, energy label/MEPS, and IEC/US-derived safety requirements.

title.en: China-to-Uganda Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入乌干达：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入烏干達：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Uganda UNBS requirements: mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC), Certificate of Conformity (CoC), UNBS Q-Mark/import inspection, energy label and MEPS, and IEC/US-derived safety standards (IEC 60335-2-24) with R-600a refrigerant.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与乌干达UNBS要求差距对照：强制性出口前符合性验证（PVoC）、符合性证书（CoC）、UNBS Q标志/进口检验、能效标签与最低能效标准（MEPS），以及IEC/美标衍生的安全标准（IEC 60335-2-24）配合R-600a制冷剂。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與烏干達UNBS要求差距對照：強制性出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）、符合性證書（CoC）、UNBS Q標誌/進口檢驗、能效標籤與最低能效標準（MEPS），以及IEC/美標衍生的安全標準（IEC 60335-2-24）配合R-600a製冷劑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Uganda legislation, UNBS PVoC programme requirements, applicable standards, energy-efficiency thresholds, and import inspection procedures with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行乌干达法律、UNBS PVoC方案要求、适用标准、能效门槛值及进口检验程序。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行烏干達法律、UNBS PVoC方案要求、適用標準、能效門檻值及進口檢驗程序。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Uganda compliance gaps: (1) mandatory Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) and a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) issued by a UNBS-appointed inspection agency before shipment — Chinese CCC certification does not substitute and a per-consignment or registered/licensed CoC route is required at the load port; (2) electrical safety to UNBS-adopted IEC 60335-2-24 (IEC/US-style basis) rather than GB 4706.13, with charge documentation for R-600a; (3) energy-efficiency label and MEPS conformity to the applicable Uganda/EAC standard — Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not map directly; and (4) appointment of an in-country importer of record for clearance, UNBS import inspection, and Q-Mark/market surveillance. Uganda uses 240 V / 50 Hz (same 50 Hz as China, different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V), and as a landlocked country goods route via Mombasa or Dar es Salaam.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大乌干达合规差距：（1）强制性出口前符合性验证（PVoC）及由UNBS委任的检验机构在出货前签发的符合性证书（CoC）——中国CCC认证不可替代，须在装运港采用逐批或注册/许可CoC路径；（2）电气安全须符合UNBS采用的IEC 60335-2-24（IEC/美标基础）而非GB 4706.13，并须提供R-600a充注量文件；（3）能效标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）须符合适用的乌干达/东非共同体标准——中国GB 12021.2等级不可直接对应；（4）须委任在地进口商作为清关、UNBS进口检验及Q标志/市场监管的责任主体。乌干达采用240 V / 50 Hz（与中国同为50 Hz，标称电压不同于中国的220/380 V），且作为内陆国家货物经蒙巴萨或达累斯萨拉姆港转运。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大烏干達合規差距：（1）強制性出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）及由UNBS委任的檢驗機構在出貨前簽發的符合性證書（CoC）——中國CCC認證不可替代，須在裝運港採用逐批或註冊/許可CoC路徑；（2）電氣安全須符合UNBS採用的IEC 60335-2-24（IEC/美標基礎）而非GB 4706.13，並須提供R-600a充注量文件；（3）能效標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）須符合適用的烏干達/東非共同體標準——中國GB 12021.2等級不可直接對應；（4）須委任在地進口商作為清關、UNBS進口檢驗及Q標誌/市場監管的責任主體。烏干達採用240 V / 50 Hz（與中國同為50 Hz，標稱電壓不同於中國的220/380 V），且作為內陸國家貨物經蒙巴薩或達累斯薩拉姆港轉運。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. UNBS, the East African Community, and appointed PVoC inspection agencies are the canonical sources for Uganda market-access requirements.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
